items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures tumble as Trump tariff threats and bond sell-off rattle nerves

items.title: Dow drops 500 points as Trump's Greenland scheme sparks U.S. capital flight, fear of global trade war: Live updates
